title: ERD Empty State Guidance Modal with Video Tutorial
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see a helpful guidance modal when I navigate to the ERD page without any objects, so that I know I need to add Salesforce objects to my dictionary first.
description:
When a user clicks on the Entity Relationship Diagram menu and has 0 objects in their dictionary, display a modal instead of an empty ERD page.

## Modal Content
- Message: "To view an entity relationship diagram, you need to first add Salesforce objects to your dictionary."
- Embedded YouTube tutorial video (URL to be provided)
- Button to navigate directly to the dictionary page to add objects
acceptance_criteria: Modal appears when ERD is accessed with 0 objects in the dictionary
Modal displays instructional text explaining the prerequisite
Modal includes a video tutorial placeholder
Modal includes a button to navigate to the dictionary page
ERD loads normally when objects exist
ux_changes: New empty-state guidance modal on the ERD page that educates users about the prerequisite of adding Salesforce objects. Includes instructional text, video tutorial, and a navigation button.
implementation_notes: Modal checks the object count on page load. Video URL to be updated once the tutorial is recorded. Navigation button added to the modal at Ryan's request.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the modal with text and video placeholder. Ryan requested adding a navigation button to the modal, which was added.
